# **🤖 AI Study Planner Using Django & Python**

An intelligent study planning web application developed using **Django \+ Python \+ AI** that helps students organize subjects, generate study schedules, track progress, and receive AI-powered study guidance.

---

## **👨‍💻 Student Details**

**Student Name:** Vijohn David K  
**Project Type:** Django with Python Project  
**Project Name:** AI Study Planner Using Django & Python

---

# **🚀 Features**

✅ User Signup & Login  
✅ Secure Authentication  
✅ Add Subjects  
✅ Generate AI Study Timetable  
✅ Dashboard with Progress Tracking  
✅ Study Streak System  
✅ Subject Completion Percentage  
✅ AI Study Chatbot  
✅ Export Timetable PDF  
✅ Modern Responsive UI

---

# **🛠 Technologies Used**

* Python  
* Django  
* HTML5  
* CSS3  
* SQLite  
* JavaScript  
* VS Code  
* Google Gemini API / AI API

---

# **📂 Project Structure**

ai\_study\_planner/

│  
├── planner\_app/  
│   ├── templates/  
│   ├── models.py  
│   ├── views.py  
│   ├── forms.py  
│   ├── urls.py  
│   ├── ai\_helper.py  
│   └── utils/

├── manage.py  
├── requirements.txt  
└── README.md

---

# **⚙ Installation**

Clone repository:

git clone Project-5

Move into project:

cd Project-5

Create virtual environment:

python \-m venv demo

Activate:

Windows

demo\\Scripts\\activate

Install packages:

pip install \-r requirements.txt

Run migrations:

python manage.py migrate

Run server:

python manage.py runserver

Open:

http://127.0.0.1:8000/

---

# **🤖 AI Configuration**

Create `.env`

GOOGLE\_API\_KEY=your\_key\_here

or

OPENAI\_API\_KEY=your\_key\_here

# **🎯 Learning Outcome**

This project demonstrates:

* Full Stack Django Development  
* Authentication System  
* Database Operations  
* AI Integration  
* Responsive UI Design  
* PDF Export
